name: TP-Link JetStream 28-Port Gigabit L2 Managed Switch with 24-Port PoE+ - 24 Ports - Manageable - 2 Layer Supported - Modular - 4 SFP Slots - 463.80 W Power Consumption - 384 W PoE Budget - Optical Fibe
shortName: TP-Link JetStream 28-Port Gigabit L2 Managed Switch with 24-Port PoE+
description: 28-port managed Gigabit PoE switch with 24 Power-over-Ethernet ports and SFP uplinks for large deployments.
